title: Monster
company: Naomi Wood (Gobbess) for anyone who has been afraid to dip their toe in or felt all at sea. A tentacled tale of myth and monstrosity about feeling exposed and learning to love both people and pond life. A ‘highly relatable’ show that will leave you feeling ‘seen’. This is a show about the transformative power of chucking yourself in the deep end.
description: 'Monster' is a 'hilarious' and joyful spoken word show by Naomi Wood (Gobbess) for anyone who has been afraid to dip their toe in or felt all at sea. A tentacled tale of myth and monstrosity about feeling exposed and learning to love both people and pond life. A ‘highly relatable’ show that will leave you feeling ‘seen’. This is a show about the transformative power of chucking yourself in the deep end.
content_warnings: TW mention of violence, death related to alcohol abuse, disordered eating

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex

reviews.excerpt: Genre: Drama , Solo Performance , Solo Show A stripped down, solo performance, initially biographical and then story telling. Barely theatrical, but quirkily engaging.
